Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 260}You can use the shared computer in the first floor lounge for research, or to run purchased software.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}All software is single-use only, and can be purchased from MangaStar Net Café. Like many activities, using the computer will take up a portion of your day.[n]{f 1 1}
